title: Found error in internal cell while parsing Verilog
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

Using Yosys as of ebf23cd6, run Yosys on the following Verilog found by VlogHammer (just `yosys file.v` is fine):

```verilog
module expression_00032(b5, y15);
  input signed [5:0] b5;
  output [3:0] y15;
  assign y15 = (0 ? b5 : b5) > 0;
endmodule
```

## Expected behavior

Yosys parses the file successfully.

## Actual behavior

```
ERROR: Found error in internal cell \expression_00032.$gt$expression_00032.v:4$1 ($gt) at kernel/rtlil.cc:830:
  attribute \src "expression_00032.v:4"
  cell $gt $gt$expression_00032.v:4$1
    parameter \Y_WIDTH 4
    parameter \B_WIDTH 32
    parameter \A_WIDTH 32
    parameter \B_SIGNED 1
    parameter \A_SIGNED 0
    connect \Y $gt$expression_00032.v:4$1_Y
    connect \B 0
    connect \A { \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5]
 \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 }
  end
```
code_blocks:

  attribute \src "expression_00032.v:4"
  cell $gt $gt$expression_00032.v:4$1
    parameter \Y_WIDTH 4
    parameter \B_WIDTH 32
    parameter \A_WIDTH 32
    parameter \B_SIGNED 1
    parameter \A_SIGNED 0
    connect \Y $gt$expression_00032.v:4$1_Y
    connect \B 0
    connect \A { \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5]
 \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 [5] \b5 }
  end
